visuals.title: Collection Interface Hierarchy
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Collection Interface Hierarchy
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Collections Overview and Interfaces</text>
  
  <!-- Collection Interface -->
  <rect x="160" y="60" width="100" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Collection
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- List Interface -->
  <rect x="60" y="120" width="80" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    List
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Set Interface -->
  <rect x="160" y="120" width="80" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="200" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Set
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Queue Interface -->
  <rect x="260" y="120" width="80" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="300" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Queue
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Map Interface -->
  <rect x="160" y="200" width="80" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="200" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Map
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Collection to List -->
  <line x1="210" y1="100" x2="100" y2="120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Collection to Set -->
  <line x1="210" y1="100" x2="200" y2="120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Collection to Queue -->
  <line x1="210" y1="100" x2="300" y2="120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Separator line -->
  <line x1="50" y1="180" x2="370" y2="180" stroke="#90CAF9" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Text label for separator -->
  <text x="210" y="195" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Separate Interface Hierarchy
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
